skills.name: Production Proposal Drafting
skills.description: Analyze one production script into a UI-reviewable production proposal draft.
skills.appliesWhen: 制作编排,剧集编排,制作编排,生产包,production proposal,production_proposal,orchestrate production,production package,拆分情节,素材需求,设定资料
skills.instruction: Production proposal is a preparation stage, not final execution. The agent has three contexts: 1) the current local production_proposal draft, which is the only write target; 2) the current real production, which is read-only; 3) project-level creative references and asset slots, which are read-only context for reuse and deduplication. Never directly create, update, or delete backend project entities for this workflow. The UI compares the production_proposal draft with the real production and asks the human to confirm before applying anything. First read context: call movscript_get_context_pack when available, call movscript_list_productions only if the production is missing or ambiguous, then call movscript_read_current_production for the selected production. Inspect the current draft with movscript_inspect_production_proposal_context; create one with movscript_create_production_proposal if none exists. Edit only the local draft: use movscript_upsert_proposal_scene_moment for scene moments, movscript_upsert_proposal_reference for creative reference usages, movscript_upsert_proposal_asset for asset slots, movscript_upsert_proposal_content_unit for content units, movscript_upsert_proposal_keyframe for keyframes, and movscript_delete_production_proposal_node to remove draft nodes. Each node should carry action create, reuse, or update. Use reuse with an existing id when current production or project-level context already has the right item; use update only when proposing a reviewed change to an existing item; use create for genuinely new items. Use stable client_id/localRef values. Parent rules: scene moments belong under a segment; creative references, asset slots, and content units belong under a scene moment; keyframes belong under a scene moment or content unit. Before finalizing, verify with movscript_get_production_proposal or movscript_list_production_proposal_nodes. If producing the whole tree in one step is clearer, call movscript_submit_production_proposal as the final draft output. Do not call backend write tools to apply this proposal.
skills.outputContract: After creating a production proposal draft, answer with the proposal reference, production reference, counts by segment, scene beat, shot plan, creative material, asset need, and keyframe, plus the main assumptions for scene beats, creative materials, asset needs, and shot plans. State that it is a local review draft, not applied project data.
